ocr.text: The table titled "Gold Standard Classification" includes the following rows: for Classification by Telephone Assessment, the
values are Dementia: 5, Cognitive Impairment: 0, Normal: 0, and All: 5; for Cognitive Impairment, the values are Dementia: 0,
Cognitive Impairment: 2, Normal: 2, and All: 4; for No or Minimal Impairment, the values are Dementia: 1, Cognitive
Impairment: 2, Normal: 26, and All: 29; and for All, the values are Dementia: 6, Cognitive Impairment: 4, Normal: 28, and All:

The second table, with the header "Samples," lists Average depth with categories including Non-synonymous, Stopgain, and
Stoploss. Under SureSelect with ≥ 5, values are Intronic: 6194, Splicing: 35, ncRNA: 4873, Intergenic: 33569, Exonic: 981,
Non-synonymous: 25, and Stoploss: 4; for (n = 22) with ≥ 10, values are Intronic: 4297, Splicing: 34, ncRNA: 3790, Intergenic:
21713, Exonic: 792, Non-synonymous: 17, and Stoploss: 3. Under TrueSeq with ≥ 5, values are Intronic: 29372, Splicing: 8,
ncRNA: 7537, Intergenic: 74431, Exonic: 211, Non-synonymous: 4, and Stoploss: 0; for (n = 6) with ≥ 10, values are Intronic:
16252, Splicing: 7, ncRNA: 10153, Intergenic: 60889, Exonic: 199, Non-synonymous: 4, and Stoploss: 0. Under 1000 G with ≥
5, values are Intronic: 2619, Splicing: 11, ncRNA: 309, Intergenic: 1951, Exonic: 307, Non-synonymous: 6, and Stoploss: 1; for
(n = 6) with ≥ 10, values are Intronic: 1352, Splicing: 8, ncRNA: 168, Intergenic: 1183, Exonic: 213, Non-synonymous: 5, and
Stoploss: 1.
